title: Poker Night Pro 500-Piece Texas Hold'em Poker Set | 14g Numbered Metal-Core Chips with Values, 2 Decks, Dealer & Blind Buttons | Aluminium Case Gift Box | Ages 14+ | Pro Quality & Easy Storage
features: Our high-quality 500 poker chips set includes a stylish gift box and heavy-duty aluminium case with reinforced interior. Guaranteed not to crack and perfect for your casino night games or game night!
500 premium metal-core poker chip set with values: 1 (white) x 150 | 5 (red) x 100 | 10 (blue) x 75 | 50 (green) x 75 | 100 (pink) x 50 | 500 (brown) x 50 - Quality gambling chips!
Premium numbered 14g metal-core casino chips. Smooth, perfect for stacking and suitable for tournaments & cash games. Great gambling gifts for men or women. Made by poker players for poker players
2 decks of 100% plastic professional playing cards (1 x red, 1 x blue) | Dealer button | Small and big-blind buttons | 5 x acrylic dice. Poker cards professional style are great for Black Jack too!

2 pip large-index jumbo 'poker size' card deck | Community cards are easy to see across the table and last up to 50 times longer than regular paper cards. The best Texas Holdem poker accessories around!
description: Product Description A premium texas holdem poker set from Poker Night Pro is all you need for a great night at the table with your friends. Our aluminium case is heavy duty, with a thicker, more robust interior to ensure the internal chip channels never crack. We know you don't want your set to arrive with dents or scratches, especially if you are buying it as a gift, so we first pack it in a protective polystyrene casing and then a beautiful outer gift box. Our 14g chips are made from clay with a metal core for that ideal casino feel. They stack perfectly, make a satisfying clink every time and have no rough or sharp edges, unlike other makes. We have also given them values suitable for both tournament and cash games with a great distribution - plenty of low-value chips for the early blind levels and a smaller number of high-value chips for the later stages - and all large enough to easily read across the table. Our professional casino-quality cards are 100% plastic, completely waterproof and will last up to 50 times longer than paper cards. They can be bent and flexed and will return to their original shape every time. Smooth on the faces, they will glide across the felt but have a very fine texture on the backs to help with shuffling and dealing. Each deck comes with the usual 52 cards - 13 of each suit plus 2 jokers and a special thank you card from us. And of course, you also get the dealer button, small and big-blind buttons and 5 traditional dice. Aluminium Case Sturdy Design Super-Strong Internal Structure 2 Keys Included 500 Chips for up to 10 Players Case Weight: 8.5kg Case Dimensions: 560mm x 220mm x 65mm Stylish Gift Box Spot UV Design - a Great Gift Thick Card Construction Polystyrene Inner Box Full Protection From Damage Total Weight: 9.35kg Box Dimensions: 595mm x 265mm x 105mm Quality Chips and Cards 500 x 14g Clay/Metal-Core Chips 2 Decks of Professional 100% Plastic Cards 54 Cards per Deck (including 2 Jokers) Big & Small Blind Buttons (50mm Diameter) Dealer Button (50mm Diameter) 5 Acrylic Dice Professional Cards 100% Plastic Professional Playing Cards Completely Waterproof Card Dimensions: 88mm x 63mm Casino Quality - 54 Cards per Deck Jumbo Index - Designed for Poker Included: 1 Deck of Red Backs / 1 Deck of Blue Backs 2 Pips per Card - Poker Style 14g Clay/Metal-Core Chips - Perfect Values for Either Tournament or Cash Games 150 x Grey and White (Value 1) 100 x Red and Gold (Value 5) 75 x Blue and Beige (Value 10) 75 x Green and Blue (Value 50) 50 x Pink and Lilac (Value 100) 50 x Brown and Beige (Value 500) Total Value = 35,150
